author: isragdd
description: Create isolated, highly customizable and interactive progress bars. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: isragdd
manifest.description: Create isolated, highly customizable and interactive progress bars.
manifest.name: Simple ProgressBar

name: Simple ProgressBar

releases.author: isragdd12
releases.description: # Changelog ## v1.1.0 Hello! I made a few (lot) of changes on this new version `1.1.0`!!! This is the first big update since release:) ### Added - Forced id when creating an object. Now you will get an error and the block won't render if you try to create a progress bar object without an id property. - `data.json` file, and usage. - UUID added automatically for every object so now your objects won't overwrite between themselves when sharing a same id. - Added kitten:3 ### Changed - Now the objects data is saved in a `data.json` file, meaning you won't lose the data when closing the app/note/vault, etc. - The `id` property is kinda useless now, but i'll keep it because i have more things in mind for later updates:) ### Removed - Bugs ### Feedback If you want to suggest a feature, give feedback on the plugin, report bugs, or anything else, feel free to contact me on [Discord](https://discord.com/users/1206317093327347793)!
releases.name: v1.1.0

releases.author: isragdd12
